semantic.$description: SEMANTIC tier — intent aliases that name a ROLE, not a value. Second tier of the standard DTCG base/semantic/component convention. path[0] is always 'semantic'. Every $value is an alias of the form {base.category.name} (curly braces are the DTCG alias syntax; no '.value' suffix; must point to a leaf). This is the layer a consumer themes: one scheme override (e.g. a dark context) re-points these aliases. Add one block per application scheme the brand defines in GRAMMAR.
